text: A short orientation session in the Lakeshore Health System literature-review workspace (the heart-failure remote-monitoring readmissions question, 12 sources S-001â€“S-012). The user asked to see the dashboard; the assistant read OVERVIEW.md and skills/dashboard.md and initially pointed at the already-running server on http://127.0.0.1:8765/, but that turned out to be a different workspace's server holding the port. The assistant then launched this workspace's own dashboard via tools/server.py on port 8766 and confirmed it live at http://127.0.0.1:8766/ (screening board, sources, findings, themes). Ended with the user exiting right after the new server came up.
